text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking through the shopping
district, I come across El Condor Pasa holding her
head in her hands.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer! Great timing!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm actually competing against these old
documents right now!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sí! I'm on cooking duty today, so I went into the
kitchen...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And there, I found a "secret recipe" stuck
between the shelves!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's just like an ancient text! It's even missing some
words here and there, like a puzzle!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yup! I'm certain this is some kind of challenge left
behind by the Miho Dormitory students that came
before me.
I have her show me this "ancient text."

There's some obvious damage to the document,
but it's clear at a glance that this is a recipe for
curry.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's what they want you to think! I thought so
too when I first read it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But there's no way students of old would leave
behind such an easy challenge!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's like in the game I was playing the other day,
where chest right next to the door turned out to
be a mimic! I won't be fooled so easily again!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure there's some secret in the missing parts of
the recipe!
choice_data_list: I think it's just been nibbled at by bugs.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No way! I'm sure it was hidden on purpose!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Like this missing part right here—I think there
could be more to it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Judging by how it's written, this here should be
read as...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
"Extremo!" The students from before are telling us
this is the ultimate ingredient!
choice_data_list: I think you're reading too much into it.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No way! I can't beat this challenge thinking like
that! If I'm gonna win, I gotta read between the
lines!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: All right! Now this blank spot must be...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
A secret spicy seasoning that I haven't seen
before.

For the sake of the challenge, El Condor Pasa
continues purchasing ingredients based on her
own interpretations of the paper.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Perfect! I've got everything I need for victory!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
As long as everyone enjoys it, it'll be a total
success!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, El, you're with your trainer. You had me
worried, getting back so late.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So, did you buy the ingredients?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You betcha! I found everything!

She tells Grass Wonder in detail about the old
document, the "secret recipe," and how she
solved the mystery.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No matter how you look at it, this recipe sure
seems a lot like curry...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You're being naive too, Grass! It's a trap! We
can't win if we take it at face value!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hmm... But El, if you want to call this a complete victory, don't you need to make something that everyone at the dorm can enjoy?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sí! Naturally!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
With all these insanely spicy ingredients, I don't
know if anyone is even going to be able to eat
it...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! B-but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: This is terrible! I gotta do something!
choice_data_list: Let's make a new batch with everyone in mind!
We could try to sweeten it up with some sugar.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Great idea! We still have time! Let's get some
ingredients for regular curry!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Well, I guess the mystery game is over! Now...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's time for a race! I still haven't lost yet!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You're always giving your all, for better or
for worse.

After that, El Condor Pasa buys some normal
curry ingredients to secure a victory.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I see! That just might work!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I really don't think it will...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Come now, let's go buy some normal ingredients.
I'll even help you out.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ah, uh... okay...

And so, El Condor Pasa heads out once again,
this time with Grass Wonder, to buy new
ingredients.
